arts.ttl: Why is Oleksandr Zinchenko missing from Arsenal squad against Tottenham?
arts.sum: Arsenal confirm that Oleksandr Zinchenko is out of the squad to face North London rivals Tottenham Hotspur due to a calf injury.

arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal, Tottenham lineups confirmed as Martin Odegaard, Gabriel Jesus calls made
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard is absent from the Gunners' squad against North London rivals Tottenham Hotspur, who welcome back Dominic Solanke and Micky van de Ven.

arts.ttl: Arsenal hype North London Derby with controversial rapper before Tottenham clash
arts.sum: Salieu released the single on Friday, his second since leaving jail after serving some 21 months of the 33-month sentence he received in December 2022. The second verse of that track includes the line, "I'm still kickin' like Bukayo Saka, which features within the film.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes major Arsenal change vs Tottenham after Martin Odegaard decision
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard was a major doubt for the North London derby after sustaining an ankle injury during the international break and it's now been confirmed he will miss out

arts.ttl: Team Line Ups: Spurs v Arsenal – Dominic Solanke returns
arts.oTtl: The Spurs Web – Tottenham Hotspur Football News
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has selected his Tottenham Hotspur side which will start this afternoon’s huge crunch fixture against Arsenal. Dominic Solanke has missed Tottenham’s last two... The post Team Line Ups: Spurs v Arsenal – Dominic Solanke returns appeared first on The Spurs Web - Tottenham Hotspur Football News.

arts.ttl: Team news: Jorginho one of two changes at Spurs
arts.sum: As for Spurs, Dominic Solanke and Micky van de Ven return to Tottenham’s starting line-up after missing the 2-1 loss at Newcastle United a fortnight ago through injury, while Brennan Johnson is also recalled. There is better news though in that Gabriel Jesus returns after a two-game absence to a bench that also includes deadline-day arrivals Raheem Sterling and Neto.

arts.ttl: 'I'm an Arsenal icon - but there's one major reason I don't think we will win the league'
arts.sum: Former Arsenal midfielder Emmanuel Petit is worried that Arsenal simply do not have the squad depth to beat Manchester City to the Premier League title this season

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Arsenal: 4 key battles that could decide north London derby
arts.sum: Arsenal's excellent centre-back pairing of William Saliba and Gabriel have shut out the very best, and they won't fear what's been a profligate Tottenham attack to start the 2024/25 campaign. Ange Postecoglou could do with a statement victory after a frustrating start to the new season, while dropped points for the Gunners will likely see them slip further behind Manchester City at the summit with a trip to the Etihad on the horizon.

arts.ttl: 'It wouldn't surprise me': Harry Redknapp makes big claim about Arsenal just hours before they face Tottenham
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Tottenham in just over an hour’s time and Harry Redknapp has given a bold take on the Gunners ahead of the clash....
